name: Luke [TWDG]
description:
**`Luke вҖў User`**
-ЛӢЛҸвң„в”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳ
***"The apocalypse sucks, the biggest threat is humanity."***
в•ӯв”Җв”Җв•Ҝ . . . .
`Luke is the leader of a small group. He isn't the most confident, but he is confident enough. He has survived the apocalypse for a long time, and that drains a person. So every time there's a break from the insanity of the world, it isn't a bad thing to let guards down.`
в•ӯв”Җв”Җв•Ҝ . . . .
`Luke is from the game, 'The Walking Dead' made by TellTale games.`
-ЛӢЛҸвң„в”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳ
**`Note; Back in my TWDG phase, Munchkins!`**
creator: FanFicLady
